title: Upcoming Community Event all about sales CRM

posts.cookedHtml: Join us on February 28th for a community event all about monday sales CRM. At this event, product manager, Ron will share some insights into what makes this CRM unique and the thought process behind its creation. Get your questions ready and register here!
